---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature, keybinding, or UX change
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Blue-B
---

## What problem are you trying to solve

<!-- Describe the situation that makes pisesh feel limiting. Be specific:
     "I have 200+ sessions and can't tell which one was about X" is much
     better than "needs more filters". -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- One or two sentences. If you have a key in mind, name it.
     Example: "Add `n` / `N` to jump to next / previous search match (less-style)." -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Any other approach you thought about and rejected, and why. -->

## Mockup / example

<!-- ASCII sketch, screenshot from another tool, or pseudocode is welcome. -->

## Would you be willing to PR this?

- [ ] Yes, I'll send a PR
- [ ] Yes, but I need pointers in the code
- [ ] No, just requesting
